utterances.text: But what I would want you to consider is can you hoover up a lot of other really solid talent that you ask them to prove themselves by using career Spanish and just pick up the most promising of the bunch.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And you can do that in an open talent call sense where you can say, hey, next month I want product folks.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: I know that there's going to be five product roles in the pipeline.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: Let me just stick a career span link out there.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: I can post it wherever I'd like.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: I could post it, as I said, literally anywhere because there's so much of a hurdle to getting through the process.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: But at the same time, also to be, to just clarify a little bit, we normally actually send this, we send a notion page link that has the job description, not just a link to this.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: This is just the, the signup portal.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: But, you know, it, it, what it effectively enables is for us to actually see and evaluate candidates and give you some pretty, pretty actionable information on these folks, such as whether they have a deal breaker.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So these are deal breakers that are automatically assessed based on your job description identified.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And then there's an explicit step where Donna is asked, hey, do you, do you have these issues?

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: If you do, we got to let them know.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And it's framed to be actionable.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So it's meant to be more of a what is like why you should say yes, why you should say no, as opposed to some sort of fucking arbitrary rank or some sort of sense of like, oh, because they went to Harvard, you have to pick them.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: It's, it's all completely semantic.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So I'll sort of pause there, get some initial thoughts.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: To be totally honest, I don't even want to put any pressure on you to take this on.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: I would just look for advice, feedback.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: I trust your judgment and I know your quality when it comes to your job.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So, you know, more than anything else would just love for, for honest feedback, first and foremost.

utterances.speaker: Brad Thomas
utterances.text: Yeah, for sure.

utterances.speaker: Brad Thomas
utterances.text: And just so I've got this right, Is this like applications or could this be anything?

utterances.speaker: Brad Thomas
utterances.text: So let's just say I've had someone, but they're in process.

utterances.speaker: Brad Thomas
utterances.text: Like what, what's kind of the, the actual journey here for like Donna.

utterances.speaker: Brad Thomas
utterances.text: Donna.

utterances.speaker: Brad Thomas
utterances.text: Donna's made an application and then this is her career span application.

utterances.speaker: Brad Thomas
utterances.text: Like what happens?

utterances.speaker: Brad Thomas

utterances.text: Yeah, so.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So let me show you the Donna side first.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So Donna's journey is I get into careerspan, I tell stories to fill out my profile.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: Those are the ones I showed you earlier.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And whether it is for the job that I.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: That led me here or any other job that I'm interested in, I can effectively figure out how good of a fit I am for the job.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So that's the candidate side tool.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: That's the same exact tech as just flipped for the employer.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: But it's doing the same sort of analysis of are you right for this job?

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: If you were, you know, what are the things that might kind of take you out of the running?

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: You know, let's say I say yes, I still want to apply to this job.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: It's going to do a further deeper analysis in a little bit.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: I'll show you.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: I'll do a deeper analysis that will actually adjust the score and help her identify.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: Let me show you here where there are gaps in her profile.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So it actually gives even the candidates a very.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: A ladder, laddering up of their abilities, you know, or the, the stuff that they say about themselves.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: It helps them build up a, a talking points bank, so to speak.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And then that same ins.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: Those same insights on the employer side.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So this is the employer role now or the employer platform now on the employer side, as you can see, it is more so just the candidates, whether you want to proceed with them or pass and you know, a high level summary of who they are.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: You can't look at the actual stories.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: A couple of other things we enable, we also enable you to cross compare their interview transcripts against what they've shared to help you figure out how consistently they're describing themselves, how.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: Whether it's the same voice, whether it's the same person or could it be two different people?

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So there's all sorts of cool stuff that we can do, especially once you get them into your pipeline.

utterances.text: And the employer have to pay or.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And so the idea being that you as a person posting the job would essentially, you know, you could charge a rental for the link.
